Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Yeah. Let's make it a good one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Happy New Year to you, too, Koro.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Oh man... I totally overslept. Why'd I stay up all night watchin' that stupid movie...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}It was about zombies in Italy, or somethin'... Anyone else catch it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Why would I watch something like that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Um, is anyone gonna visit the shrine?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I already stop by enough shrines on my jogs. I'd say I'm covered.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Yeah, I'll pass. I don't wanna deal with the New Year's traffic.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Oh, that's too bad. Yukari-san and the others are already there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Apparently, Mitsuru-san got kimonos for all of them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}You're going to the shrine? I thought you didn't want to go through the trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Well, I don't have anything better to do, so I'll tag along.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Look at that, turns out we all wanna go after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Well, everyone else is goin', so you're not gettin' out of it.[n]{f 1 1}
